baseParameters.Expression: If  trim(@item())[1, 10] = 'MEDINSIGHT' Then  @item()[36, 6] Else If  trim(@item())[1,8] = 'MILLIMAN' Then @item()[34,6] Else '000000'
If  trim(@item())[1, 10] = 'MEDINSIGHT' Then  @item()[29, 13] Else If  trim(@item())[1,8] = 'MILLIMAN' Then @item()[27,13] Else '000000'

If trim(@item())[1,10] = 'MEDINSIGHT' and @pipeline().parameters.RPLC_TABLE_IND = 'N' Then 'INDV_BE_MARA_RSLT' Else If trim(@item())[1,10] = 'MEDINSIGHT' and @pipeline().parameters.RPLC_TABLE_IND = 'Y' Then 'INDV_BE_MARA_RSLT_RPLC' Else If trim(@item())[1,8] = 'MILLIMAN' Then 'INDV_BE_MARA_RSLT_RPLC' Else 'NOTAVENDOR'

If trim(@item())[1,10] = 'MEDINSIGHT' and @pipeline().parameters.RPLC_TABLE_IND = 'N' Then 'INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS' Else If trim(@item())[1,10] = 'MEDINSIGHT' and @pipeline().parameters.RPLC_TABLE_IND = 'Y' Then 'INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS_RPLC' Else If trim(@item())[1,8] = 'MILLIMAN' Then 'INDV_BE_MARA_CLNCL_CLS_RPLC' Else 'NOTAVENDOR'

If trim(@item())[1,10] = 'MEDINSIGHT' and @pipeline().parameters.RPLC_TABLE_IND = 'N' Then 'MARA_CLNCL_CLS' Else If trim(@item())[1,10] = 'MEDINSIGHT' and @pipeline().parameters.RPLC_TABLE_IND = 'Y' Then 'MARA_CLNCL_CLS_RPLC' Else If trim(@item())[1,8] = 'MILLIMAN' Then 'MARA_CLNCL_CLS_RPLC' Else 'NOTAVENDOR'
